mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM news WHERE status = 0
AND category = (SELECT category FROM news WHERE id = #{category, jdbcType=BIGINT})
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news WHERE status = 0
AND category = (SELECT category FROM news WHERE id = #{category, jdbcType=BIGINT})
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news ( title, content, source, cover, view_count, like_count, status, category ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{source}, #{cover}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{status}, #{category} )
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, source = #{source}, cover = #{cover}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, status = #{status}, category = #{category} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE news SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND like_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(id) as id, category as name, '🔥' as icon, COUNT(*) as count FROM news WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source, category FROM news WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source, category FROM news WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY ( view_count * 0.6 + like_count * 0.3 + 0 * 0.1 + GREATEST(0, 100 - TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) * 2) ) DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, title, content, cover, create_time, view_count, source, category FROM news WHERE status = 0 AND (content LIKE '%视频%' OR title LIKE '%视频%') ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}
